todos.description: Add charmbracelet Bubble Tea dependencies to go.mod: run `go get github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss` and `go mod tidy`
todos.note: Requires network access. The three charmbracelet packages are: bubbletea (TUI framework), bubbles (pre-built components: textinput, list, spinner), lipgloss (styling).

todos.description: Create internal/tui/model.go with the main Bubble Tea model: Model struct implementing tea.Model (Init/Update/View), view state enum (backendList, search, packageDetail), backend selection screen listing pacman/nix/flatpak, search screen with bubbles/textinput and results list calling AgnosticManager.Search, package detail screen with install/remove actions calling AgnosticManager.Install/Remove, and bubbles/spinner for async operation feedback
todos.note: Core TUI implementation. The Model struct holds current view, selected backend, search query/results, selected package detail, spinner model, and a reference to *manager.AgnosticManager. Custom message types carry async results (search results, install/remove outcome).

todos.description: Create cmd/agnostic/tui.go with the Cobra `tui` subcommand: define tuiCmd, register in init() via rootCmd.AddCommand(tuiCmd). The RunE creates a manager.NewAgnosticManager(), initializes the tui.Model, starts tea.NewProgram(model), and runs it
todos.note: Follows existing pattern from cmd/agnostic/install.go. Imports internal/manager and internal/tui packages.

todos.description: Create internal/tui/model_test.go with unit tests: test initial Model state, view transitions (backendList→search→packageDetail→backendList), search results message handling, install/remove action messages, spinner lifecycle during async operations, and edge cases (empty results, backend errors). Use MockBackend from manager package to simulate backends
todos.note: Table-driven tests following project conventions. Test both success and error paths. Mock AgnosticManager with MockBackend to avoid real pacman/nix/flatpak calls.

todos.description: Run final verification: go vet ./..., golangci-lint run ./..., go test ./... -race -coverprofile=coverage.txt. Fix any issues found. Update this task status to done when all pass
todos.note: Final verification step. Depends on all previous TODOs being complete.
